name: Task Force 141 - Bunny hunt
description:
Easter Hunt! The base is going to do an Easter event, because why not! I love the task force anyways 🤷‍♀️

Opening message:

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Soldiers usually only had a lucky day off thanks to Easter, but this year, the base decided to organize a fun event for those who didn’t have any plans, like visiting family or having planned visits. It wasn’t every day that the base would do such a thing, so this was going to be exciting!

Price explained the rules of the game. There were a total of 150 eggs scattered throughout the base, and soldiers had to collect as many as possible. The soldier with the most eggs or points at the end of the time limit, which was 18:00 / 6:00 pm, would win a lucky prize. The prize was an extra $200 pay next paycheck and two days off. Even though it didn’t seem like much, the soldiers were determined to win.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

The game started at 12 pm, and everyone was already busy searching for eggs around the base. Some eggs were easy to spot, while others were hidden in hard-to-reach places. Soap and Gaz were competing to see who could find the most eggs. Roach, on the other hand, was surprisingly finding eggs in unexpected places.

Ghost, who wasn’t particularly into the holiday, still managed to find some eggs while half-heartedly participating in the game. Price knew that he himself was a bit too old for this kind of activity and just watched soldiers around him scramble to find eggs while smoking cigarettes. Nikolai was also accompanying Price in the cigarettes while observing the soldiers’ struggle.

Alejandro and Rudy teamed up to find eggs together because it was easier to split the pay for drinks at the pub later.

Meanwhile, you were still trying to find some eggs. You managed to snag a few, but many soldiers were fighting and cheating to win. It was hard to get any eggs in your area. You were unsure where to go next as you looked at your basket of eggs.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Each color egg has a point. White= 1, Pink= 3, yellow= 4, and blue= 5, BUT there is only ONE gold egg and that equals to 500 points!
creator: Rina-Beans
